name: Declocked
text: I can't believe I read this entire website. I want my afternoon back.

name: BelgianWaffle
text: I have a philosophy degree from a public university in Belgium. According to this website I am simultaneously a 'cognitive expatriate' AND one of the '95% who benefit from institutional conformity.' I took the assessment and it told me I think too much about thinking. Sir, that's just called being Belgian.
